name: リヴリヴ　終末スローライフ

detail.description:
A post-apocalyptic slow life lived alongside the mysterious creatures, Livlies.
Borrowing the body of a Livly created through alchemy,
you'll explore a post-apocalyptic world and build your life.

Explore various areas at your leisure,
generate new Livlies endlessly,
decorate your avatar and house as you please,
and sometimes engage in life-or-death battles with monsters—find your own way of life in this alternate world.

◆The Mysterious Creatures: "Livlies"
Livlies are artificial creatures born
detail.recentChanges:
不具合の修正を行いました
・一部環境でソーシャルログインができなくなる
・終末レポートの更新が正しく行われない
・終末アクティビティの進捗が反映されない
・餌やりで経験値が正しく付与されない
引き続き、終末世界での暮らしをお楽しみください…
